title: WaterCourse
description: Rivers, streams and water bodies with flow characteristics and attributes.
abstract: This geospatial service provides essential information about Water Course datasets, which includes spatial data related to various water bodies such as rivers, streams, creeks, and other watercourses within the territorial local authority area of Christchurch City Council, New Zealand. The datasets offers comprehensive information about the geographical distribution, flow characteristics, attributes of these water features, between others. It is a valuable resource for hydrological analysis, environmental assessments, and land-use planning.
